Subj:  Ice cubes on your balls?



Would you put ice cubes on your balls for 20 minutes if it increased your testosterone?



Cause as strange as it sounds…



There’s a growing movement of men who are putting themselves through this torture on a daily basis.



Basically each night before bed, they fill up a bag with ice cubes, and let the bag sit on their balls for 20 minutes.



And they’re calling it “cold therapy”.



From the studies, Ive read, the results have been really hit or miss for most guys.



And the odds of you actually sticking with this “midevil torture device” are probably quite slim.



Which is why I suggest taking a different approach  if you want to boost your testosterone…



One that’s not so painful…



And can still help you get the muscle, energy and drive back that you had 10-15 years ago. 



In fact, this method that I recommend was researched by Harvard University back in 2017, and they found that it could increase T-levels by as much as xx%.



So what is this proven testosterone boosting method I’m talking about?
